description.value:
Strange amphibious creatures appearing like large tan/greenish frogs with wide mouth and bulbous eyes. Have powerful membranous bat-like wings, no rear legs, long tail tipped with venomous stinger.

Category: Folklore Monster

Characteristics

STR
35		 CON
45		 SIZ
5		 DEX
55		 INT
35		 POW
55

HP: 5 | DB: -2 | Build: -2 | Move: 4 (crawling) / 8 (swimming) / 6 (flying)

Attacks

AttackSkillDamage
Bite50%1D6+DB
Sting50%1 point + Special (venom - paralysis)

Armor: 1 point of thick slimy hide

Skills: Climb 40%, Spot Prey 70%, Stealth in Water 80%, Swim 85%

Sanity Loss: Special (See 'Seeing a Water Leaper' below)

Special Abilities

  • Seeing a Water Leaper - mere sight causes Sanity check; fumble = death; fail = 1D8; Regular = 1D6; Hard = 1D4; Extreme = 1D3
  • Screech - blood curdling scream once per day, 1/1D6 Sanity, those driven insane stunned for 1D8 minutes
  • Sting - venomous stinger causes fast-acting paralysis (1D4 minutes onset)
  • Sting CON check: fumble = heart attack/death; fail = total paralysis; Regular = 2 penalty dice; Hard = 1 penalty die; Extreme = no penalty
  • Venom duration 10 minutes to 1 hour
  • Can only store 2 stings per day
  • Attack in groups, cooperate to drag large prey
  • Propel themselves out of water to fly short distances (up to 3 rounds)
  • Also known as 'water leapers'
  • Attracted to powerful Mythos beings, absorb magical energy through porous skin
